title: delphinium subalpinum
intro: Delphinium subalpinum, also known as the alpine delphinium or mountain larkspur, is a flowering plant species belonging to the genus Delphinium and family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Delphinium subalpinum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and its roots and leaves are commonly used in herbal preparations.
